name: machine-learning
description: Research-grade machine learning skill for Claude Code — the full field (foundations, deep learning, transformers/LLMs, diffusion, RL, probabilistic ML) plus the rigor that makes results trustworthy.

plugins.name: machine-learning
plugins.description: Research-grade machine learning expertise: foundations and learning theory, classical ML, deep learning, transformers and LLMs, generative models (diffusion/flow matching), reinforcement learning, probabilistic/Bayesian ML, graph/geometric and representation learning — plus evaluation and statistics, reproducibility, distributed training, data curation, interpretability/safety, and the research workflow. Methodology-first: it teaches how to produce results that are correct, fairly measured, and reproducible.
